content:
“什么是糖果幽灵👻？”

“靠过来点，你们可要竖起耳朵仔细听清楚，这个饥肠辘辘的亡灵的故事……”

✦ 墨菲 CV：大内 茜

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

"What is a Candy Ghost 👻 ?"

"Gather closer! You all need to perk up your ears and listen carefully to the story of this starving ghost..."

✦ Murphy VA: Akane Ouchi
